# James meets Jarvanis

📁 Characters: James (../Data/Characters/James%2014f6a0f77a694f4cb18881bb58846c94.md), Jarvanis (../Data/Characters/Jarvanis%20373b77c5f599467d9f1dbdd198cca4e5.md)

“I am Archmage Jarvanis”, said the wizard.

“I am James,” said James.

…

“You know, a lot of people have it out for you,” said James.

“Tell me about it,” said Jarvanis.
